description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a job named build in the build stage that runs a before_script installing libseccomp2, libseccomp-dev and wget via apt, prints the kernel version with uname -r, downloads libseccomp‑2.3.3.tar.gz from GitHub, extracts it, configures and installs it with ./configure and make && make install, then returns to the previous directory. In the main script, change into the src directory and compile the project with cd src && make. Configure the job to store the generated bin_waf file as a build artifact. No caches, services, or conditional rules are defined.
